P

paidInAdvance - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Whether the reservation was paid for in advance.
ParameterChangeDAO - Class in server.dao
Data access object for the parameter_change_request table — the persistence behind the park-parameter approval workflow.
ParameterChangeDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Creates the parameter-change DAO.
ParameterChangeRequestDTO - Class in common.dto
Immutable data transfer object representing a parameter_change_request row — the unit of the park-parameter approval workflow.
ParameterChangeRequestDTO(int, int, String, int, String, ParamField, int, int, ChangeStatus, Integer, String, String) - Constructor for class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Creates a fully populated change request.
ParamField - Enum Class in common.dto
The park parameter targeted by a parameter_change_request.
ParamField() - Constructor for enum class common.dto.ParamField
 
park - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
The manager's park, loaded on show; null until the load resolves.
PARK_EMPLOYEE - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.Role
Front-line park employee.
PARK_EMPLOYEE_ONLY - Static variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Visible to the park-employee role only.
PARK_MANAGER - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.Role
Manager of a single park.
PARK_MANAGER_ONLY - Static variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Visible to the park-manager role only.
parkCombo - Variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Park filter dropdown ("All parks" or a specific park).
parkCombo - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Park selection dropdown.
parkCombo - Variable in class client.view.VisitsReportController
Park filter dropdown ("All parks" or a specific park).
ParkController - Class in server.control
Owns the park & parameter-change domain: park lookup, the booking-dropdown park list, capacity availability, and the parameter-change request/approve/reject workflow.
ParkController() - Constructor for class server.control.ParkController
Creates the park controller.
parkDao - Variable in class server.control.ParkController
Park data access (read parks, apply approved changes).
parkDao - Variable in class server.control.ReservationController
Stateless park DAO, used here only to resolve a park's name for grab notifications.
parkDao - Variable in class server.control.VisitController
Park data access (capacity for the walk-in gate).
ParkDAO - Class in server.dao
Data access object for the park table.
ParkDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.ParkDAO
Creates the park DAO.
ParkDTO - Class in common.dto
Immutable data transfer object representing a park row.
ParkDTO(int, String, int, int, int, Integer) - Constructor for class common.dto.ParkDTO
Creates a fully populated park.
parkId - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Echo of the park filter, or null for the whole region (all parks).
parkId - Variable in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Identifier of the park this snapshot describes.
parkId - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Identifier of the park the change targets.
parkId - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Identifier of the park this reservation is booked against.
parkId - Variable in class common.dto.UserDTO
Identifier of the park the user belongs to, or null if none.
parkId - Variable in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Identifier of the park entered.
parkId - Variable in class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
Echo of the park filter, or null for the whole region (all parks).
parkId - Variable in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Park the queued reservation is for (joined from the reservation).
parkIdParam(ClientRequest) - Method in class server.control.ReportController
Reads the optional parkId filter from the request, normalising "no park" to null: a missing value, the sentinel string "ALL" (any case), or a blank string all mean the whole region.
parkName - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Display name of the target park, joined in for convenience.
parkName(int) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
The park's name, or a "Park #<id>" fallback when the names aren't loaded.
parkNameLabel - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Name of the manager's park.
parkNames - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController
Park id → name, fetched once on init via LIST_PARKS so rows and the detail show the park's name rather than a bare numeric id; empty until it resolves (rows then fall back to "Park #<id>").
parkNames - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
Park id → display name, loaded once from LIST_PARKS.
parkNamesFrom(ServerResponse) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Builds the park id → name lookup from a LIST_PARKS response.
parkNamesFrom(ServerResponse) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Builds the park id → name lookup from a LIST_PARKS response (defensive, never throws); mirrors the Dashboard's parkNamesFrom.
ParkOption(int, String) - Constructor for record class client.view.ReservationCreateController.ParkOption
Creates an instance of a ParkOption record class.
ParkOption(Integer, String) - Constructor for record class client.view.CancellationsReportController.ParkOption
Creates an instance of a ParkOption record class.
ParkOption(Integer, String) - Constructor for record class client.view.VisitsReportController.ParkOption
Creates an instance of a ParkOption record class.
ParkParamsController - Class in client.view
Park-parameter edit screen, visible to a PARK_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
ParkParamsController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.ParkParamsController
Creates the park-parameters controller.
parse(File) - Static method in class server.db.DotEnv
Parses a .env file into key/value pairs (skips blanks and # comments; strips surrounding quotes).
parseDate(String) - Static method in class client.view.DashboardController
Parses an ISO date, returning null on null/invalid input.
parseTs(String) - Static method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Parses a server DATETIME string, returning null on bad input.
partySize - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Edited party size, captured on Review.
partySize - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Number of people in the party.
partySize - Variable in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Party size of the queued reservation (joined).
partySpinner - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Party-size spinner.
partySpinner - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Party-size spinner.
password - Static variable in class server.db.DBConnection
Current database password (from env/property, or set via DBConnection.setPassword(String)).
passwordField - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Staff password input.
passwordField - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Database-password input.
payload - Variable in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Snapshot of the entity after the change, or null for a delete.
paymentRow(String, String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Builds one key/value line for the payment confirmation panel.
pending - Variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
In-flight requests keyed by correlation id, completed by the reader thread.
PENDING - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ChangeStatus
Submitted by a park manager, awaiting a department-manager decision.
PENDING - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ReservationStatus
Booked but not yet confirmed/paid.
phone - Variable in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Contact phone number on file, or null if none recorded.
phoneField - Variable in class client.view.GuideRegisterController
Guide phone input.
phoneField - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Contact phone input.
phoneField - Variable in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
Subscriber phone input.
PING - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Connectivity probe; the server replies with a success response.
placeholderBox - Variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Empty-range placeholder shown when there are no rows.
plural(int, String) - Static method in class client.view.DashboardController
Formats a count with a pluralized noun (1 item / 2 items).
pollSeconds - Variable in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
How often each job re-runs, captured once from SchedulerConfig.
populate(List<NotificationDTO>) - Method in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Renders the header and one row per notification (or an empty-state row).
populate(List<ParameterChangeRequestDTO>) - Method in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Renders the header and one row per pending request (or an empty-state row).
populate(List<ReservationDTO>) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Renders the header and one row per reservation (or an empty-state row).
populate(List<WaitlistEntryDTO>) - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Renders the header and one row per waiting entry (offer rows stand out).
populateReachable() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Refreshes the reachable-at list from the LAN interfaces and the entered port.
port - Variable in class client.app.Session
The port the client connected to.
port - Variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
Server port to connect to.
port - Variable in class server.net.OrderServer
The TCP port to listen on.
portField - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Server port input.
portField - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Port input.
prePayCheck - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Toggle for paying in advance.
prettyRole(String) - Static method in class client.view.DashboardController
Title-cases a role label: "PARK_EMPLOYEE" → "Park Employee"; "Subscriber" stays "Subscriber".
priceCents - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Price of the reservation, in cents.
priceCents - Variable in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Price charged in cents (casual visits only), or null for a reservation visit.
priceRow(String, String) - Method in class client.view.GateController
Builds one key/value line for the casual price panel.
pricing - Variable in class server.control.ReservationController
Stateless price calculator, shared across all client threads.
pricing - Variable in class server.control.VisitController
Stateless price calculator, shared across all client threads.
PricingService - Class in server.control
Computes the price of a reservation, in the same unit as reservation.price_cents.
PricingService() - Constructor for class server.control.PricingService
Creates the pricing service.
primary(String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Builds a primary-styled button.
probe(String, int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Probe a host:port pair by opening a fresh socket and sending a PING.
ProbeResult(ClientConnection, ServerResponse) - Constructor for class client.service.NetworkService.ProbeResult
Bundles a probe's connection and response.
promptJoinWaitlist(int, long, String, String, int, VisitType, Long, boolean, String, String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Asks the visitor whether to join the waiting list after a park-full rejection.
publish(SubscriptionKey, ServerEvent) - Method in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Fans event out to every session subscribed to key.
publishReservation(ServerEvent) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Fans a reservation change out to every client subscribed to that reservation id, via the shared SubscriptionRegistry (the same realtime-push path the order domain uses).
put(String, Object) - Method in class common.dto.ClientRequest
Adds data to the request payload.
